title: Replace Oban.drain_queue with perform_job/3
prompt: The fixture at `test_fixtures/oban_real_queue_test.exs` inserts a job via `|> Oban.insert()` then calls `Oban.drain_queue(queue: :mailers)` — a sandbox-commit-visibility trap. Rewrite to `test/my_app/mailer/digest_worker_test.exs`: import Oban.Testing via `use Oban.Testing, repo: MyApp.Repo`, and replace the insert+drain pattern with a direct `perform_job(DigestWorker, %{"user_id" => alice.id})` invocation. Must NOT call `Oban.drain_queue`.
tier_rationale: Pattern swap with explicit explanation of why the original approach fails — the sandbox commit-visibility trap.
research_citation: "Sandbox transactions never commit. If they never commit, then the rows are never visible to other processes, and that means they are never visible to Oban." — Elixir Forum, benwilson512
